Engineering Retrospective — Sprint 42: The team identified three major wins this sprint: on-time delivery of the payments integration, zero production incidents, and successful onboarding of two new engineers. Areas for improvement include the estimation process for cross-team dependencies, which caused a two-day delay on the reporting feature. Action items: introduce dependency mapping during sprint planning and schedule a recurring sync with the data platform team. The team velocity of 68 story points was above the three-sprint rolling average of 61.
